Big Goober energy.

Goobers are hand-drawn cartoon dogs with a simple sitting shape and a lot of personality. Some are cool. Some are cowboys. Some are spider-adjacent. All are goobers.

What makes a Goober?

A Goober is a hand-drawn cartoon dog with a simple seated shape. The base design stays recognizable, but the personality changes with every version.

  • Simple rounded body shape
  • Long snoot and big simple nose
  • Hand-drawn, imperfect lines
  • Named by style, costume, mood, or chaos level

Add a Goober

Use this lower-page test tool to add new Goobers after you review the gallery. Pick an image, give it a name, choose a category, and it will appear above.

This is a local testing tool. New Goobers are saved in this browser only using local storage. They will not appear for other people until the site has a real upload backend.
Image preview will appear here.

Future public submissions

The local upload tool is for testing. Later, this can become a real submission system where uploaded Goobers are reviewed and approved before appearing on the public website.

  • Draw a new Goober
  • Name it based on the style
  • Upload it for review
  • Add approved Goobers to the public gallery
